SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE . APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BRIAN HEADEN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT PRICILLA WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEADEN, BRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, PRICILLA SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
